results.name: anime
results.description: Artwork using an anime or manga art style.

results.name: ante matters
results.description: Ante is a depreciated game mechanic where players would remove the top card of their deck from the game and give it to their opponent if they lose. Some early cards in magic would have effects that allowed players to ante more cards for effects.

results.name: antenna
results.description: A sensory organ commonly seen on bugs and bug-like creatures.

results.name: anthem
results.description: Your entire team gets +N/+N. Possibly limited to creature types or colors.

results.name: anthropomorphic
results.description: Typically nonhuman things that have human characteristics.

results.name: anvil
results.description: A traditional metalworking tool consisting of a large block of metal with a flattened top surface, and often a pointed end.

results.name: any zone type change
results.description: These cards change types in every and any zone.

results.name: apalapucia
results.description: Setting for the Doctor Who episode "The Girl Who Waited"

results.name: aquatic creature
results.description: Includes fish, whales, octopodes, leviathans, merfolk, etc.

results.name: aqueduct
results.description: Architecture for carrying water long distances.

results.name: arashin
results.description: The central city of the Abzan clan and home to its Khan and the First Tree. In the DTK timeline it contains the Great Aerie, where Dromoka makes her home.

results.name: arcade (architecture)
results.description: A series of connected arches. See also [colonnade](colonnade).

results.name: archaeology
results.description: The study of the past through what people left behind. (See also [paleontology](/tags/artwork/paleontology))

results.name: archaic
results.description: Towering, multi-armed, magical creatures native to Arcavios.
